title: USCIS FEE WAIVER - 211info
text: UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES USCIS FEE WAIVER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a filing fee waiver process for certain forms and benefit types for applicants that clearly demonstrate inability to pay the fees. There is also a fee reduction option for Form I-912. 2675 Prosperity Avenue Fairfax, VA 20598 Eligibility: The form being filed is eligible for a fee waiver (see website for a complete list of eligible forms), AND the applicant qualifies based upon one of the following criteria: -Applicant, spouse, or the head of household currently receives a means-tested benefit such as TANF, SSI, SNAP, or Medicaid -Household income is at or below 150% of the Federal Poverty Guidelines when filing (guideline list available on website) -Applicant is experiencing extreme financial hardship, including hardship from unexpected medical bills or emergencies, that prevents from paying the filing fee Hours: Not applicable (800) 375-5283 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 375-5283 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. If the Fee Waiver Request is denied, the main application is also denied and needs to be re-submitted with the proper filing fee. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Eligible immigration and naturalization applicants file Form I-912, Request for Fee Waiver, along with the application or petition they are filing and any supported documents LANGUAGES: Form I-912 is available in English only AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Immigration Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - FIND A DOCTOR LOCATOR TOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES CITIZENSHIP AND IMMIGRATION SERVICES
